Available commands:
codex [ chat | compact | config | container | goal | interrupt | status | help ] - Codex commands
component [ <component> | list | help ] - Show component command help
config [ get | list | set | help ] - Global config commands
heartbeat [ now | start | status | stop | help ] - heartbeat commands
run <command> - Run a whitelisted host command
search <query> - Search indexed chat messages
send - Send an outbound message from stdin
send <text> - Send an outbound message; hostbridge reads stdin when message args are omitted
sendfile <path> - Send an outbound file; hostbridge reads stdin when path is omitted
status - Show current thread status
theater [ create | list | post | read | status | subscribe | unsubscribe | help ] - theater commands
thread [ <thread> | config | label | list | status | help ] - Thread commands
turn [ config | info | help ] - Current turn commands
